message:
feat(search,tui): integrate cross-encoder rerank pipeline and enhance dashboard

Add optional FlashRank-based cross-encoder reranking to the hybrid search
pipeline and improve the TUI dashboard with richer search diagnostics.

- Enable frankensearch rerank feature in Cargo.toml workspace dependency
- Add FlashRankReranker integration in search_service.rs with lazy init,
  env-configurable top-k (AM_SEARCH_RERANK_TOP_K), and enable toggle
  (AM_SEARCH_RERANK_ENABLED)
- Implement rerank_results() pipeline stage that re-scores initial
  retrieval candidates using cross-encoder model for improved relevance
- Expand server lib.rs with rerank-aware search endpoint handling and
  FsScoredResult bridging for frankensearch filesystem results
- Enhance TUI dashboard with search metrics display, result preview
  panel, and rerank status indicators
- Update Cargo.lock with frankensearch-rerank transitive dependencies

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 ]
